sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88689" key="prosapolu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσαπο-λύω</orth>, <sense id="n88689.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">set free besides</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">αὐτὸν τῆς διαβολῆς</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Vit.Isoc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.255</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> Westermann.</sense> </entryFree>
